cross_route_gaps.detail: U10F derives General Public Readiness from the repository-owned route inventory and requires both Twitch and Kick Watchlist routes within the public build audit.
U10F assigned all then-owned public HTML routes to Production Smoke. R12A expands the owned route set and updates the same owner.
P8B established a permanent browser audit across major public routes and four required widths; later gates retain current route evidence.
Phase 9 P9H0-P9H7 repaired and accepted the approved History P1 defects.
Contact, Terms, Privacy, Refund Policy, and Commercial Disclosure are implemented on the R12A candidate branch but are not resolved until hosted production acceptance.
